notes: The Google Drive folder is publicly reachable, but this pass did not recover exact per-file checkpoint identifiers non-interactively.

dataset_provenance.contract_risk: README and code disagree on archive and extracted-directory naming; code path was treated as authoritative for follow-up execution.

selected_variant.selection_rationale: Procedural fixed-medium setup avoids external GRF wavespeed files and matches the canonical 10k-sample thick-lines training surface used by the native inverse-source scripts.

observed_y.normalization: No extra amplitude normalization in the loader; nearest-neighbor interpolation maps boundary-time measurements from 334x128 to 128x128.

target_q0.normalization: PNG sources are divided by 255 before storage; stored target remains the original 128x128 image-space source field.

wavespeed_cx.normalization: Procedural gaussian-lens field normalized to [1400, 4000] m/s in code.

receiver_metadata.definition: Top-boundary receiver line from p.on_grid[medium.pml_size, ...] over 334 time steps.

fno.checkpoint_identifier: Public Google Drive checkpoint folder for WaveBench baselines; exact thick_lines_gaussian_lens filename unresolved in this pass.
fno.blocker_reason: Per-file checkpoint identifiers were not enumerable from the public folder via the non-interactive probe used here.

unet.checkpoint_identifier: Public Google Drive checkpoint folder for WaveBench baselines; exact thick_lines_gaussian_lens filename unresolved in this pass.
unet.blocker_reason: Per-file checkpoint identifiers were not enumerable from the public folder via the non-interactive probe used here.

physics_contract.boundary_condition: Top-boundary pressure sensor trace with PML size 2
physics_contract.fixed_wavespeed: Selected variant uses procedural gaussian-lens wavespeed
physics_contract.initial_condition: Zero-padded 128x128 canvas with a bicubic-resized 64x64 source inserted near the top center

normalization.observed_y: Not re-normalized beyond upstream generation and loader reshape

accepted_thresholds.comparison_standard: Approved design gate: median normalized residual <= 0.02 and at most 5% of checked examples above 0.05.

forward_model.blocker_reason: No local dataset staging and the active environment lacks jax, jwave, ffcv, and ml_collections, so the reproduction check could not be executed.

setup_risks: README/code disagreement on dataset archive and extracted-directory naming.
Active environment lacks ffcv, jwave, jax, and ml_collections.
No local WaveBench dataset tree or native baseline checkpoints were present.
follow_up_directions: Stage the WaveBench dataset under <wavebench repo>/wavebench_dataset/ and normalize the singular/plural path mismatch explicitly.
Resolve exact FNO and U-Net checkpoint artifacts for thick_lines_gaussian_lens or choose a native baseline retraining path.
Provision a dedicated environment with ffcv, jax, jwave, and ml_collections before loader or forward-model smoke.
Run the native-baseline reproduction and forward-model validation backlog items before any shared-encoder supervised implementation.
